infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PaceUp uses your camera to add photos to your runs and rides.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PaceUp accesses your photo library to add photos to your runs and rides.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PaceUp saves your activity screenshots to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: PaceUp uses motion data to count your steps during runs.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PaceUp uses your location to track your route, find nearby events, and show your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PaceUp uses your location to track your route during runs and rides, even when the app is in the background.
